ddls:
CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "video_title" TEXT /* Title of the video */,
  "video_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  "video_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the video (e.g., 1080p, 720p) */,
  "video_bitrate" INTEGER /* Bitrate of the video in kbps */,
  "video_format" TEXT /* Format of the video (e.g., MP4, MKV) */,
  "video_category" TEXT /* Category of the video (e.g., Movie, TV Show, Documentary) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "content_provider" TEXT /* The provider of the video content */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the video thumbnail */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., subscriber, admin) */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan of the user (e.g., Basic, Premium) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the service */,
  "device_ids" TEXT /* List of device IDs associated with the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality score entry */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video stream session */,
  "squality" REAL /* Subjective quality score */,
  "sloading" REAL /* Subjective loading score */,
  "sstalling" INTEGER /* Subjective stalling score */,
  "video_quality_mode" TEXT /* The quality mode used for streaming */,
  "video_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the video during the streaming session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network condition entry */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video stream session */,
  "initial_max_dl_rate" INTEGER /* Initial maximum download rate in kbps */,
  "e2e_rtt" INTEGER /* End-to-end round-trip time in ms */,
  "initial_buffering_latency" INTEGER /* Initial buffering latency in ms */,
  "video_initial_buffer_download" INTEGER /* Initial buffer download in ms */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of network (e.g., WiFi, 4G, 5G, Ethernet) */,
  "network_signal_strength" TEXT /* Signal strength of the network */,
  "isp" TEXT /* Internet Service Provider (ISP) of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stalling_events" (
  "stalling_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stalling event */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video stream session */,
  "stalling_length" INTEGER /* Total length of stalling events in ms */,
  "stalling_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of time spent in stalling during the playing phase */,
  "stalling_times" INTEGER /* Number of stalling events during the playing phase */,
  "stalling_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the stalling event */,
  "stalling_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stalling event started */,
  "stalling_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stalling event ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stalling_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playing_phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playing phase entry */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video stream session */,
  "playing_length" INTEGER /* Length of the playing phase in ms */,
  "total_time_of_playing_phase" INTEGER /* Total time of the playing phase in ms */,
  "average_rate_of_playing_phase" INTEGER /* Average rate of the playing phase in kbps */,
  "playing_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playing phase started */,
  "playing_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playing phase ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video statistic entry */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video */,
  "total_plays" INTEGER /* Total number of plays for the video */,
  "average_vmos" REAL /* Average VMOS (Video Mean Opinion Score) for the video */,
  "average_stalling_ratio" REAL /* Average stalling ratio for the video */,
  "average_playing_length" INTEGER /* Average playing length for the video in ms */,
  "average_total_dl_rate" INTEGER /* Average total download rate for the video in kbps */,
  "total_buffering_time" INTEGER /* Total time spent buffering in ms */,
  "total_stalling_time" INTEGER /* Total time spent stalling in ms */,
  "average_network_type" TEXT /* Average network type used for streaming */,
  "average_region" TEXT /* Average geographic region where the video was streamed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_statistics_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video stream session */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the user's feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback */,
  "feedback_category" TEXT /* Category of feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
